title: erigeron engelmannii
intro: Erigeron engelmannii, also known as Engelmann's daisy or mountain fleabane, is a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of western North America. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to the presence of essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Erigeron engelmannii include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and alleviate cold and flu symptoms. Erigeron engelmannii can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil to utilize its medicinal properties.
